mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content, status) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{product_id}, #{order_item_id}, #{rating}, #{content}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.name user_name, p.name product_name, p.image_l, o.status AS order_status, o.created_at AS order_created_at, COALESCE(rc.report_count, 0) AS report_count FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_id, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM reports WHERE target_type = 'REVIEW' GROUP BY target_id ) rc ON rc.target_id = r.review_id WHERE r.review_id = #{review_id}

SELECT r.*,p.name AS product_name,p.image_l,oi.option_name FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.product_id, p.name product_name, p.image_l, oi.option_name FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.review_id IS NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND r.review_id IS NULL
SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{id} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.name user_name, u.nick_name, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at,
DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS created_at_text,
r.reply_content, r.reply_created_at, DATE_FORMAT(r.reply_created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reply_created_at_text,
u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name, u.photo_name,
COALESCE(oi.option_name, po.option_name) AS option_name
FROM reviews r
JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
LEFT JOIN product_options po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id
WHERE r.product_id = #{value} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at,
DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS created_at_text,
r.reply_content, r.reply_created_at, DATE_FORMAT(r.reply_created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reply_created_at_text,
u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name, u.photo_name,
oi.option_name AS option_name
FROM reviews r
JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
WHERE r.product_id = #{value} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY r.review_id DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT r.review_id, r.product_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at,
IFNULL(ri.image_count, 0) AS image_count,
ri.review_image
FROM reviews r
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_id, COUNT(*) AS image_count, MIN(image_url) AS review_image FROM images WHERE target_type = 'REVIEW' GROUP BY target_id ) ri ON r.review_id = ri.target_id
WHERE r.product_id = #{value} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY IFNULL(ri.image_count, 0) DESC,
CASE WHEN IFNULL(ri.image_count, 0) = 0 THEN CHAR_LENGTH(IFNULL(r.content, '')) ELSE 0 END DESC,
r.rating DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at,
DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS created_at_text,
r.reply_content, r.reply_created_at, DATE_FORMAT(r.reply_created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reply_created_at_text,
p.name AS product_name, p.image_l,
u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name, u.photo_name,
oi.option_name AS option_name
FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id
WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_id, p.name AS product_name FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id SET r.reply_content = #{reply_content}, r.reply_created_at = NOW() WHERE r.review_id = #{review_id} AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
